zh.St. Oran's Chapel Cemetery-the Reilig Ou: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納
zh.lifeSummary: 當King Donald Bane III, of Scotland於大約1033年出生在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾時，他的父親Duncan I King of Scotland33歲，母親Suthen25歲。他於1059年與Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth在英國蘇格蘭安格斯雷斯可比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1094年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1099年在英國蘇格蘭安格斯雷斯可比享年68歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納。

nameMeanings.name: Bane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English ban ‘slayer, murderer’ (Old English bana).
Irish, Scottish, and English: variant of   Bain  .
French: metonymic occupational name from Old French ban(n)e ‘hamper, large basket’. This surname is very rare in France; in North America it may hence alternatively be an altered form of Bain 4.

variants.name: Bain
meanings: Scottish, Manx, and Irish: nickname for a fair-haired man, from Gaelic bàn, Irish bán ‘white, fair’. This surname is common in the Highlands, first recorded in Perth in 1324. It is also found as a shortened form of McBain , from Mac B(h)eathain. As a Manx name (spelled Bane) this may be a shortened form of Manx Macguilley Vane, equivalent to Irish Mac Giolla Bháin ‘son of the fair youth’. Compare Irish Kilbane .
English (northern) and Scottish: nickname for a hospitable person, from northern Middle English beyn, bayn ‘welcoming, friendly’ (Old Norse beinn ‘straight, direct’).

English (northern) and Scottish: nickname from northern Middle English bān, bain ‘bone, leg’ (Old English bān, Old Norse bein), perhaps denoting someone with a gammy leg. In northern Middle English -ā- was preserved, whereas in southern dialects (which later became standard), it was changed to -ō-.

nameMeanings.name: Donald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Domhnall . The final -d of the Anglicized form derives partly from misinterpretation by English speakers of the Gaelic pronunciation, and partly from association with Germanic-origin names such as Ronald . This name is strongly associated with clan Macdonald, the clan of the medieval Lords of the Isles, but is now also widely used by families with no Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When King Donald Bane III, of Scotland was born about 1033, in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Duncan I King of Scotland, was 33 and his mother, Suthen, was 25. He married Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth in 1059, in Rescobie, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1094. He died about 1099, in Rescobie, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.St. Oran's Chapel Cemetery-the Reilig Ou: Isle of Iona, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Donald Bane III, of Scotland est né environ 1033, à Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Duncan I King of Scotland, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Suthen, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth en 1059, à Rescobie, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1094. Il est décédé environ 1099, à Rescobie, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Isle of Iona, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.St. Oran's Chapel Cemetery-the Reilig Ou: Isle of Iona, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als King Donald Bane III, of Scotland um 1033 in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Duncan I King of Scotland 33 und seine Mutter Suthen 25. Er hat 1059 in Rescobie, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1094 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 1099 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Rescobie, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth nel 1059, nel Rescobie, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1094. Morì circa 1099, nel Rescobie, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: King Donald Bane III, of Scotlandが約1033年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアソルで生まれた時，父Duncan I King of Scotlandは33歳，母Suthenは25歳であった。1059年にイギリススコットランドアンガスレスコビでHextilda fitz Andlaw of Perthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1094年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1099年にイギリススコットランドアンガスレスコビで68歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ アイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Oran's Chapel Cemetery-the Reilig Ou: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 이오나
ko.lifeSummary: King Donald Bane III, of Scotland(이)가 대략 1033년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 앳홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duncan I King of Scotland(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Suthen(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1059년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 레스컵이에서 Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1094년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1099년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 레스컵이에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Donald Bane III, of Scotland nasceu aproximadamente 1033, em Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Duncan I King of Scotland, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Suthen, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth em 1059, em Rescobie, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1094. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1099, em Rescobie, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Isle of Iona, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Oran's Chapel Cemetery-the Reilig Ou: исл оф иона, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Donald Bane III, of Scotland родился около 1033 г. в местности атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Duncan I King of Scotland было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Suthen, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth в 1059 г. в местности рескоби, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1094 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 1099 г. в местности рескоби, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности исл оф иона, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания.
